properties.notes:
**Batch 1,2,3 - Scenario 32: Foreign Resident - Pre-8 May 2012 Grandfathering**

Property purchased before 8 May 2012. Became foreign resident later - grandfathered under old rules.

**Timeline:**
- 10 Mar 2010 to 20 Jun 2018: Main residence (Australian resident) - 8.28 years
- 20 Jun 2018: Became foreign resident (moved to Singapore)
- 20 Jun 2018 to 10 Nov 2024: Foreign resident period (6.39 years)
- Property not rented - kept available
- Total ownership: 14.67 years

**Key Rules:**
- Property acquired **before 8 May 2012**
- Grandfathered under old foreign resident rules
- Main residence exemption available without life event requirement
- Property must not be used to produce income
- Six-year absence rule applies (not exceeded)
- **NO CGT PAYABLE** - Grandfathered exemption applies

**Expected Result:**
- NO CGT PAYABLE - Pre-8 May 2012 grandfathering provisions apply
- Total capital gain (before exemption): $406,700
- Full exemption (property not rented, within 6-year rule)

**ATO Rules Applied:**
- Section 118-145 ITAA 1997 (Six-Year Absence Rule)
- TD 2019/20 (Foreign Resident Main Residence Exemption)
- Pre-8 May 2012 grandfathering provisions
- No life event required for properties acquired before threshold date

additional_info.expected_outcome: NO CGT PAYABLE - Pre-8 May 2012 grandfathering applies (TD 2019/20)
